steps.title: Contrast meter patterns
steps.content: The goal asks for a difference between the poems' meters. The notes say Meghadūta uses quantitative meter, based on long and short syllables, while Widsith uses alliterative meter, based on repeated sounds.

steps.title: Reject language or swapped details
steps.content: A contrasts languages, B misdefines quantitative meter, and C assigns long and short syllables to Widsith. The needed sentence contrasts the real meter patterns. The answer is D.
